sentences:
Category: Pantry > Cereal & Breakfast > Kids Cereals
Brand: Kelloggs
Product: Frosted Flakes Cereal
Size: 355 g

Category: Pantry > Easy Meals & Sides > Macaroni & Cheese
Brand: Bens
Product: BISTRO EXPRESS Brown Basmati Rice
Size: 240 g
Description: BEN'S ORIGINAL BISTRO EXPRESS Brown Basmati Rice brings the rich, nutty aromas and flavours of India to your dinner table in just 90 seconds. This microwave rice side dish offers authentic 100% whole grain Indian brown basmati rice to make your meals more flavourful. BEN'S ORIGINAL BISTRO EXPRESS rice comes in a BPA-free microwavable pouch that makes cooking easier by eliminating prep and cleanup. To get this brown rice ready to serve, all you have to do is place the pouch in the microwave and cook it for 90 seconds, or pour the contents into a skillet and heat thoroughly. Perfect as a flavourful rice side dish or as part of a main course meal, this basmati rice is delicious paired with your favourite curries, braised or roasted meats, or served plain. This whole grain rice contains no artificial colours, flavours, or preservatives. BEN'S ORIGINAL brand is dedicated to creating meals and experiences that offer everyone a seat at the table.One 240g pouch of BEN'S ORIGINAL BISTRO EXPRESS Brown Basmati RiceMicrowave rice pouch that helps you enjoy hassle-free dining with a taste of deliciously flavoured rice in just 90 secondsEach pouch offers authentic 100% whole grain Indian brown basmati rice to make your meals more flavourfulPair this cooked rice side dish with your favourite protein or serve it plain for a quick bitePlace the pouch in the microwave and cook it for 90 seconds, or pour the contents into a skillet and heat thoroughly

Category: Dairy & Eggs > Yogurt > Kid Friendly
Brand: Danone
Product: Kids Yogurt Drink, Strawberry, Paw Patrol
Size: 6x93.0 ml
Description: You only want the very best for your family – and so do we! That’s why our strawberry yogurt drink is made with real fruit purée and 5g of sugar per serving. Every awesome flavour of Danino drinkable yogurt is also a yummy source of calcium with a cool Paw Patrol character on the bottle! A delight to be enjoyed whenever and wherever you like, since it keeps for up to 8 hours out of the fridge*.*This product must be first kept refrigerated, and then can be kept up to 8 hours out of the refrigerator unopened. Product should then be consumed and not be refrigerated again to preserve taste.Source of CalciumReal Fruit PureeOnly 5g of sugar per servingValue pack of 6 bottlesB Corp Certified

Categories: Frozen Food > Frozen Fruit & Vegetables > Frozen Fruit, Frozen Food > Natural and Organic, Natural and Organic > Frozen Foods > Fruit
Brand: PC Organics
Product: Frozen Berries and Cherries Club Size, Organic
Size: 1.5 kg
Description: Organics Frozen Berries and Cherries Club Size includes dark sweet cherries, blueberries, and blackberries for a colourful blend of juicy organic flavours. Add to smoothies or milkshakes or use in muffin, pie, and dessert recipes.

Category: Frozen Food > Frozen Fruit & Vegetables > Frozen Fruit
Brand: President's Choice
Product: Dark Sweet Cherries, Blueberries and Blackberries Power Fruit Blend 
Size: 600 g
Description: Enjoy a naturally sweet taste of ripe fruit at any time of year with this colourful mix of sweet cherries, blueberries and blackberries. Use in smoothies and bake in muffins or pies. As a topping for French toast, simmer fruit with a touch of maple syrup. It's a colourful cherry berry combination in one convenient package.

Category: Drinks > Sports & Energy > Energy Drinks
Brand: Red Bull
Product: Energy Drink The Yellow Edition™
Size: 4x250.0 ea
Description: Red Bull Energy Drink Tropical 250 ml (4 Pack)

Category: Fruits & Vegetables > Fresh Fruits > Berries & Cherries
Brand: none
Product: Blueberries 1 pint
Size: 1 ea
Description: Blueberries range in colour from a deep purple-blue to a blue-black, both with a silvery sheen called bloom. Sweeten your morning by sprinkling blueberries on your cereal or pancakes, or add blueberries to a spinach salad with pecans and blue cheese.

Categories: Fruits & Vegetables > Fresh Juice & Smoothies > Smoothies, Drinks > Juice > Smoothies & Nectars
Brand: Bolthouse
Product: Berry Boost
Size: 946 ml
Description: Fruits per bottle 7 1/2 servings* * Canada's food guide  Berry flavoured blend of apple puree, apple juice & blackberry puree in a blend of 3 from concentrate & 5 not from concentrate juices with natural flavours  100% juice  After more than 100 years of working the land, one lesson rises to the top: the best beverages come from the best ingredients. Crisp veggies. Ripe fruit. All blended together to make great-tasting juices, smoothies and protein shakes. Goodness in, goodness out.  Feel good About what's in this bottle which includes the juice of† : 5 1/4 apples 42 berries 1/2 banana Per bottle † Not an exhaustive list  Since 1915

Category: Snacks, Chips & Candy > Chips & Snacks > Nuts, Seeds & Jerky
Brand: Sally
Product: Blanched Sliced Almonds
Size: 200 g
Description: Provides a rich source of protein, fiber, and healthy fats. Adds texture and nutty flavor to baked goods, salads, and main dishes.

Category: Frozen Food > Meals, Entrees & Sides > Meals
Brand: Chef Bombay
Product: Vegetable Samosas
Size: 300 g
Description: Our family's most favorite dishes, crafted with only the best, all natural ingredients. We hope you enjoy wonderful meal, from our table to yours..A savoury mix of vegetables and exotic Indian spices wrapped in a multilayered light and crisp pastry.

Category: Pantry > Oils & Vinegar > Olive Oils
Brand: Bertolli
Product: Mild Taste Extra Virgin Olive Oil - Organic
Size: 750 ml
Description: Voted Most Trusted Olive Oil brand by Canadian shoppers based on the 2026 BrandSpark® Canadian Trust Study. Though initially sweet, its caramel flavour is only the beginning. Then the soft aromas of almonds appear, and the fresh taste of tomatoes and vegetables. And the finale? An extra virgin olive oil with a subtle bitterness, and an aftertaste of simplicity. Pairs well with light dishes like chicken, seafood and vegetables. Smoke Point: 392° F†/200° C. 100% R-PET bottle. Certified Organic. Non-GMO Project Verified. Orthodox Union Kosher. Bertolli’s legacy in olive oil spans over 160 years, crafting authentic extra virgin olive oil (EVOO) and other olive oil varieties.

Category: Fruits & Vegetables > Fresh Cut Fruits & Vegetables > Fresh Cut Vegetables
Brand: none
Product: Veggie Platter, Small (Broccoli, Carrots, Mini Cucumbers, & Grape Tomatoes)
Size: 818 g
Description: Tray includes Broccoli, Carrots, Mini Cucumbers & Grape Tomatoes.Grape tomatoes may be substituted

Category: Snacks, Chips & Candy > Chips & Snacks > Snack & Granola Bars
Brand: Kashi
Product: Chewy Chia Whole Grain Bars Dark Chocolate, Almond & Sea Salt
Size: 175 g
Description: Our chewy granola bars are truly lovable. They bring our unique blend of whole grains together with whole, roasted nuts and succulent dark chocolate. And with 4g of fibre per serving, they are as nourishing and tasty.Combining dark chocolate, roasted almonds and a touch of sea salt with chia means you can enjoy sweet and salty flavour with 0.1 g omega-3 polyunsaturates in one satisfyingly chewy granola bar.A sweet and salty granola bar made with whole grain oats, crunchy almonds, rich dark chocolate and a touch of sea salt.Chewy, Tasty, Simple. Kashi Chewy Whole Grain Bars arethe perfect snack for the whole family. Great for snacking at home, at school, at the office, or when you're on the go!13g Whole Grains per serving per serving; 4g fibre per servingNo artificial flavours or coloursNon-GMO Project Verified

Categories: Pantry > Canned & Pickled  > Natural and Organic, Natural and Organic > Canned > Fruit and Vegetables
Brand: Muir Glen
Product: Fire Roasted Crushed Tomatoes
Size: 796 ml
Description: Whole tomatoes are harvested at peak flavour, roasted over an open flame that blackens the skin and sears in the unique flavour of fire-roasted goodness. Then they are crushed for easy use in soups, sauces and stews. 1/2 cupA gluten-free foodOrganicNon GMO

Category: Fruits & Vegetables > Fresh Vegetables > Carrots, Radish & Root Vegetables
Brand: none
Product: Red Carrot
Sold by weight
Description: A sweet, earthy flavour with a satisfyingly crisp texture in every bite. Shred these carrots raw into salads for a bright crunch, or roast them whole to deepen their natural sweetness for a simple side dish. They also add a foundational flavour and colour to hearty soups and stews.
